rulings.Case Title: DEVINE HARDY VS. ALYCE CARDINALE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 22, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF DEVINE HARDY MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MAXIMO INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. ESTHER EAMES, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 22, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT ESTHER EAMES, LLC AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Defendant's Exhibits B and C are the answer and complaint from an unrelated case. Said exhibits are the same in both the filed motion and the courtesy copies provided to the Court. On the basis of the provided exhibits, the Court finds that Defendant did not shift its burden with respect to triable issues of material fact. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MASAZUMI INOUE ET AL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 22, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to February 22, 2019. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than January 31, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. AROYTIMESE POWELL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 22, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT AROYTIMESE POWELL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice not uncertain and is sufficient to support an unlawful detainer action. Whether repairs have in fact been made, whether the cost of labor/materials was as demanded, etc. are questions of fact that cannot be addressed on a demurrer. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that such allegations must be included in the Notice or Complaint. = (501/CFH)
